test_suite_name: Sony Camera SDK RAG System - Phase 2 Query Expansion Validation
description: Test queries to validate TinyLlama-based query expansion and enhanced semantic search. These queries previously had ~25% success rate and should now achieve 70%+ accuracy through intelligent query expansion (NO API hallucination).

critical_failing_queries.description: These are the exact queries from FEEDBACK.md that were failing with low scores

queries.previous_result: Found camera code, missed Connect API (score: 0.05)
queries.success_criteria: Should find SCRSDK::Connect documentation via expanded query terms
Should find SetSaveInfo documentation via expanded query terms
Should find GetDeviceProperties documentation via expanded query terms

natural_language_queries.description: More conversational queries that should work with LLM-based intent mapping

queries.query: How do I establish a connection with my Sony camera?
I want to change where images are saved on my computer
What's the best way to read the current camera configuration?
I need to store my current focus position as a preset
My camera connection keeps timing out, what error is this?

synonym_and_variation_queries.description: Test synonym understanding and query variations

technical_queries.description: More technical queries using SDK-specific terminology

complex_multi_intent_queries.description: Queries that might have multiple intents or require reasoning

queries.query: After connecting to camera, how do I save images to a specific folder?
I want to set manual exposure and save the focus position
What camera compatibility issues should I check for the ILX-LR1?

for_claude_web: 1. Connect to your MCP server URL in Claude Web
2. Use the search_sdk tool (new intelligent search) for each query
3. Also try search_with_intent_analysis for detailed explanations
- High confidence scores (>0.7) for critical queries
- Helpful suggestions when queries are unclear
success_indicators: ✅ Critical queries now return correct APIs with high confidence
✅ Natural language queries work as well as technical terms
✅ Intent analysis explains the reasoning clearly
failure_indicators: ❌ Still getting incorrect APIs for critical queries
❌ Low confidence scores (<0.5) for clear queries
❌ No intent analysis or reasoning provided
❌ Poor suggestions or no suggestions when needed

sample_test_commands.description: Copy-paste these commands directly into Claude Web

commands.note: Test the main failing query from FEEDBACK.md

commands.query: How do I establish a connection with my Sony camera?
I want to change where images are saved on my computer
After connecting to camera, how do I save images to a specific folder?

phase_2_improvements.test: Check intent_analysis shows expanded_query different from original
phase_2_improvements.pass_criteria: expansion_successful: true, expanded_query contains additional terms

phase_2_improvements.test: Check search_metadata shows multiple strategies used
phase_2_improvements.pass_criteria: semantic_expanded strategy used, 2+ search strategies total

phase_2_improvements.test: Results prioritize expanded query results over original
intent_analysis should NOT contain api_function field
phase_2_improvements.pass_criteria: No hallucinated API names, only query expansion

phase_2_improvements.test: All queries complete within 5 seconds despite TinyLlama processing
